[{"type":"vis","embeddableConfig":{"attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsXY","title":"Total Token Usage Over Time by Model and Provider","state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"line_0":{"index":"traces-agent_builder.otel-default-@timestamp","query":{"esql":"FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete" AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| EVAL `Input Tokens` = TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| EVAL `Output Tokens` = TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| EVAL `Total Tokens` = COALESCE(`Input Tokens`, 0::LONG) + COALESCE(`Output Tokens`, 0::LONG)
| STATS `Total Token Usage` = SUM(`Total Tokens`) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Model` = attributes.gen_ai.request.model, `Provider` = attributes.gen_ai.system
| SORT `Time`"},"timeField":"@timestamp","columns":[{"columnId":"line_x","fieldName":"Time","params":{"format":{"id":"custom","params":{"decimals":2,"pattern":"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"}}},"meta":{"type":"date"}},{"columnId":"line_y_0","fieldName":"Total Token Usage","params":{"format":{"id":"number","params":{"decimals":0,"compact":true}}},"meta":{"type":"number"}},{"columnId":"line_breakdown","fieldName":"Model","meta":{"type":"string"}}],"ignoreGlobalFilters":false}}}},"internalReferences":[{"type":"index-pattern","id":"traces-agent_builder.otel-default-@timestamp","name":"indexpattern-datasource-layer-line_0"}],"visualization":{"preferredSeriesType":"line","legend":{"isVisible":true,"position":"right"},"axisTitlesVisibilitySettings":{"x":false,"yLeft":false,"yRight":true},"layers":[{"layerId":"line_0","accessors":["line_y_0"],"layerType":"data","seriesType":"line","xAccessor":"line_x","yConfig":[{"axisMode":"left","forAccessor":"line_y_0"}],"splitAccessors":["line_breakdown"]}]},"adHocDataViews":{"traces-agent_builder.otel-default-@timestamp":{"id":"traces-agent_builder.otel-default-@timestamp","title":"traces-agent_builder.otel-default","name":"traces-agent_builder.otel-default","timeFieldName":"@timestamp","sourceFilters":[],"fieldFormats":{},"runtimeFieldMap":{},"fieldAttrs":{},"allowNoIndex":false,"allowHidden":false,"type":"esql"}},"query":{"esql":"FROM traces-agent_builder.otel-default
| WHERE name == "ChatComplete" AND @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| EVAL `Input Tokens` = TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| EVAL `Output Tokens` = TO_LONG(attributes.gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| EVAL `Total Tokens` = COALESCE(`Input Tokens`, 0::LONG) + COALESCE(`Output Tokens`, 0::LONG)
| STATS `Total Token Usage` = SUM(`Total Tokens`) BY `Time` = BUCKET(@timestamp, 75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Model` = attributes.gen_ai.request.model, `Provider` = attributes.gen_ai.system
